nodes.name: custom-servers.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive developer guide (23 sections, 415 lines) covering both AI-powered and manual creation of custom MCP servers for FusionAL, including project structure, Dockerfile patterns, server implementation examples, testing workflows, and production deployment with Docker Compose.

nodes.name: docker-gateway.md
nodes.summary: Brief reference note clarifying FusionAL's two runtime port bindings: port 8009 for direct uvicorn launch and port 8089 for Docker Compose, with quick health-check curl commands for both.
nodes.languageNotes: Clarifies port 8009 vs 8089 discrepancy that arises from how compose.yaml maps the host port — critical operational knowledge for connecting clients.

nodes.name: troubleshooting.md
nodes.summary: Concise troubleshooting reference covering three common failure scenarios: server unreachable (uvicorn/compose startup checks), Docker sandbox errors (daemon access and isolation bypass), and MCP tools not appearing in clients (endpoint config and log inspection).
